## Model

- Name:
- Provider: <!-- ollama / openrouter / anthropic / openai / other -->

- Local: <!-- yes / no -->
- Cost per M output tokens: <!-- e.g., $0.25 or FREE -->

## V-Score Results

```
E (Emergence):
W (Warmth):
S (Stability):
B (Breath):
H (Hex Balance):
R (Ring Yield):
```

## How was this measured?

```bash
# Command used
void benchmark --model "model-name"
```
